repos.name: li-cursor-agents
repos.description: Local Cursor SDK agent runner for li-langverse (mock CI)

repos.name: li-language
repos.description: Pyhton-style language that is memory-safe, compiled and proovable

repos.name: lis
repos.description: Webserver writtne in Li, for max security and performance. Definitions are secure by design and definable in .toml

repos.name: mmo
repos.description: MMORPG realms, shards, gateway routing, deploy profiles (PH-MMO)

repos.name: physics.custom
repos.description: Arbitrary and unphysical custom physics laws for games and research (PH-PHYS-CUSTOM)

repos.name: proof-library
repos.description: Li proof corpus UI — catalog vs Lean, divergence, human votes

repos.name: sim
repos.description: Li Engine simulation API — step, reset, replay hooks (PH-SIM)

repos.name: store.realtime
repos.description: Realtime store facade — Redis/Postgres/memory, not a new DB engine (PH-MMO)

repos.name: studio
repos.description: Li World Studio editor shell (PH-GD, PH-UX)

repos.name: ui
repos.description: Li UI types and frame hooks for games and simulation tools

repos.name: world
repos.description: World snapshots and save/load for Li Engine / World Studio (PH-GD-2)
